ValidationRule.description: Rule to ensure that only one user may fetch a scratch org from the pool
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND ( RecordType.DeveloperName = 'Scratch_pool_org', ISCHANGED( Pool_claim_token__c ), ISPICKVAL(Pool_allocation_status__c , 'assigned'), OR ( ISBLANK( Pool_claim_token__c ), NOT ( ISBLANK( PRIORVALUE( Pool_claim_token__c ) ) ) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Pool already claimed. When set the Pool Claim Token cannot be changed to a new token, only removed.
